india_trends.title: EU envoy seeks investment liberalisation chapter in FTA with India, early investment pact conclusion
india_trends.summary: European Union Ambassador Herve Delphin seeks an investment liberalization chapter and an early investment protection pact for the India-EU free trade agreement. The FTA, expected to be finalized soon, will boost trade for both sides.

india_trends.title: US market today: Shake Shack misses estimates as fast food demand weakens, shares drop 28%
india_trends.summary: Fast ​food chain operator Shake Shack on Thursday swung to ​a quarterly loss and missed revenue estimates, hurt by rising commodity costs such as that of beef and weak consumer spending, sending its shares down about ‌28% in ⁠early ⁠market trading.

india_trends.title: US market today: Aircraft parts maker Howmet lifts annual forecasts on robust demand
india_trends.summary: Howmet Aerospace on Thursday reported first-quarter profit and revenue ​above estimates and lifted its ​annual forecast on the back of growth ​in its commercial aerospace and industrial gas turbine businesses.

india_trends.title: US stocks today: Datadog raises annual forecast on strong cloud security demand, shares jump 36%
india_trends.summary: Cloud security firm Datadog has boosted its annual forecast. The company surpassed Wall Street expectations for its first quarter. india_trends.title: US market today: Carlyle profit misses as asset sales fail to boost shareholder income
india_trends.summary: Global ​investment firm Carlyle reported lower-than-expected profit for ​the first quarter on Thursday, as asset sales failed to translate to income ​for shareholders.

india_trends.title: US market today: McDonald's focus on value, big new burger drive sales in first quarter
india_trends.summary: McDonald's posted better-than-expected sales in the first quarter as a new burger - and a continuing emphasis on value - brought in customers.

india_trends.title: Govt issues uniform guideline for measuring states' GDP with revised base year of 2022-23
india_trends.summary: The Statistics Ministry has released new guidelines for calculating states' Gross State Domestic Product. The base year for these calculations is now 2022-23. This change ensures all states and Union Territories use a standardized framework. This will allow for better comparison of economic performa

india_trends.title: US stocks today: S&P 500, Nasdaq at record highs as oil pullback brings relief
india_trends.summary: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq reached record highs on Thursday, driven by a significant drop in oil prices. Hopes for a U.S.-Iran peace agreement could normalize crude supplies through the Strait of Hormuz, boosting market sentiment. The Dow Jones Industrial Average also saw gains.

india_trends.title: Small-cap stock under ₹50 hits 5% upper circuit after this ₹500 crore acquisition update
india_trends.summary: AVI Polymers' stock surged to ₹24.25 after announcing a 90% stake acquisition in JVTR Consultants, valued at ₹500 crore. The acquisition aims to diversify into technology services. The stock has rebounded significantly since early April's low of ₹10.61.

india_trends.title: Wonderla Posts record Q4 revenue on Chennai park boost; stock slides 1.3%
india_trends.summary: For the full year FY26, total income grew 14% to ₹55,108 lakhs, while EBITDA rose 12% to ₹19,245 lakhs
